all_items.description: 🍞Open-source, local-first AI workspace with Agents, multi-model chat (GPT/Claude/Gemini/DeepSeek), Notion-like docs, AI image & video generation, email, calendar & terminal. Your data never leaves your device. AI 工作台：智能代理 + 多模型对话 + 文档管理 + AI 生图/视频 + 邮件/日历/终端

all_items.name: awesome-vibe-coding
all_items.description: Your go-to resource for learning to code with AI: Cursor and Claude skills, rules and commands, prompts and learning resources for non-technical builders.

all_items.name: awesome-openclaw
all_items.description: A curated list of the best OpenClaw resources: official projects, skills, plugins, dashboards, deployment tooling, memory systems, and guides.

all_items.name: awesome-skills-cn

all_items.name: ai-rpi-protocol
all_items.description: Repo-native protocol for AI-assisted coding that enforces a simple discipline: research first, plan second, code last. Drop it into any repository to reduce wrong implementations, cut rewrite cycles, and improve decisions earlier in the workflow. Works with Cursor, VS Code, Claude Code, and Windsurf across Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok, and DeepSeek.

all_items.name: cube-pets-office
all_items.description: Cube Pets Office turns invisible AI workflows into a cozy pixel office for your OpenClaw — dynamically assembling CEO, managers, and workers with roles, skills, and configs, then bringing the entire organization, workflow stages, and lively characters to life in a flexible 3D scene.

all_items.name: OpenClaw-hot-skills-zh
all_items.description: 致力于将 各个skills 平台的优质、热门、安全的项目转化为中文版 Skills。降低阅读理解难度和优化门槛，提供更符合中文开发者习惯的开源技能库。

all_items.name: ai-resource-manager
all_items.description: Package manager for AI rules and prompts with semantic versioning and automatic distribution to AI tools.

all_items.name: don-cheli-sdd
all_items.description: Don Cheli — SDD Framework. The most comprehensive Specification-Driven Development framework for AI agents. 71+ commands, 42 skills, 15 reasoning models. TDD mandatory, OWASP audit, Anthropic Skills 2.0 compatible. Works with Claude Code, Gemini/Antigravity, Cursor, Codex. ES/EN/PT.

all_items.description: MiloAgent — Autonomous AI Growth Agent for Reddit, Twitter/X & Telegram. Self-learning bot with LLM-powered content generation, multi-account management, community automation, and A/B testing. Zero cost, open source.

all_items.name: modsearch
all_items.description: CLI toolkit for AI agents — turns search queries into structured web evidence (JSON). Provider-extensible architecture, designed to be called from Agent Skills (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.).

all_items.name: skills

all_items.description: Deploy websites with a single API call. Built-in versioning with instant rollback. Agent skill for Claude Code, Codex, and other AI agents.

all_items.name: Antigravity-S2W
all_items.description: A VS Code extension developed with Antigravity that transforms installed AI skills (Claude/Codex/Gemini) into executable Global Workflows. Install from ZIP/GitHub and invoke via '/' commands.

all_items.name: hmem
all_items.description: Humanlike persistent memory for AI agents — MCP server with 5-level lazy-loaded SQLite memory. Works with Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Windsurf, OpenCode.
